insights: Most traffic routes through TE5 (Eero Max 7) - this is the main WiFi access point
TE2 handles downstream switches/hubs with multiple IoT devices
Alpha servers (TE10-12) have minimal DNS traffic - consider LAG for bandwidth
Critical priority devices (>500K queries) need monitoring for potential issues
Devices 'Not on Switch' are connected via downstream equipment (Eero mesh, other switches)
